benchmark.description: Benchmark definition to run. Only benchmark_v1 is currently supported.

scene_file.description: Path to the .tnhpp scene. Relative paths are resolved from the config file directory.

worker_count.description: Optional RayTraceRunner worker count. When omitted, Tonatiuh++ uses QThread::idealThreadCount().

chunk_size.description: Optional rays per worker chunk. Different chunk sizes use different deterministic chunk seeds, so flux_grid_sha256 is expected to change.

target_side_id.description: Receiver side to accumulate. 1 maps to front-side hits.

target_bounds.description: Target grid bounds in benchmark-v1 mapped target coordinates.

photon_export.description: Benchmark mode currently supports no-export only.

output_file.description: Result JSON path. Relative paths are resolved from the config file directory.

flux_grid_output_file.description: Optional CSV output path for the computed flux grid in MW/m2. Relative paths are resolved from the config file directory. The CSV row-major order matches flux_grid_sha256.

flux_grid_binary_output_file.description: Optional raw binary output path for the computed flux grid in MW/m2. Values are row-major IEEE 754 binary64 doubles in little-endian byte order with no header or metadata.

reference_file.description: Optional reference JSON path for metric, hash, and flux-grid comparison.

reference_flux_grid_file.description: Optional reference flux grid CSV path. Relative paths are resolved from the config file directory. If reference_file also defines flux_grid_file, both paths must resolve to the same file.

reference_flux_grid_binary_file.description: Optional reference flux grid binary path. Relative paths are resolved from the config file directory. If reference_file also defines flux_grid_binary_file, both paths must resolve to the same file. Binary reference grids are preferred over CSV reference grids when both are provided.
